name: TinyUser Vietnamese Persona Specification v2
approach: 3 anchor fields sampled from real census data, then Qwen generates remaining fields as one coherent persona. Every field is human-readable and directly reportable.

age_bracket.source: UN World Population Prospects 2024, GSO 2024 mid-term census. Adults 18+ only.

province.source: GSO 2024 intercensal census + 2025 province merger (Resolution 202/2025/QH15). All 34 post-merger provinces and municipalities. Population from Wikipedia/GSO April 2024 data.
province.note: Weights are population / total_population. Every province is included — no 'other' bucket.

llm_generated_fields.description: Given the 3 anchors (age, gender, province), Qwen generates ALL of these as one coherent persona. Every field is directly usable in the final report.

fields.name: job_title
fields.note: Must be realistic for age + province. A 22-year-old in Lai Chau is not a VP of Engineering. A 50-year-old in An Giang is likely in agriculture or aquaculture.

fields.name: industry
fields.note: Must match job title and province. Mekong Delta = agriculture/aquaculture. Binh Duong/Dong Nai = manufacturing. Da Nang/Khanh Hoa = tourism. HCMC = diverse.

fields.name: company_size
fields.note: Farmers, street vendors, retirees = not_applicable. Factory workers in Dong Nai = large/enterprise.

fields.name: education_level
fields.note: GSO: ~28% of labor force holds training certificates. University concentrated in Hanoi, HCMC, Da Nang. Rural provinces much lower.

fields.name: income_bracket
fields.note: GSO 2024: average monthly salary ~7.7M VND. Agriculture workers earn lowest (~4-5M). Urban tech workers can reach 30M+.

fields.name: primary_platform
fields.note: Facebook 95%, Zalo 86%, YouTube 80%, TikTok 53% among internet users. 21% of population still offline. Older rural skews Zalo. Young urban skews TikTok.

fields.name: search_language
fields.note: Vast majority Vietnamese. English for tech workers, university-educated urban youth, international-facing roles.

fields.name: top_3_frustrations
examples: Can't find a reliable supplier for my shop
Shrimp prices dropped but feed costs went up
My kids' school is 15km away with no bus
Too much paperwork at the bank branch
Factory overtime is mandatory but barely pays more
fields.note: CORE of the simulation. Must be specific to this person's actual life. A shrimp farmer in Ca Mau has completely different problems than a software engineer in HCMC.

generation_prompt_template.system: You are generating realistic Vietnamese personas for market research. Each persona must be a coherent, believable person. All fields must be consistent with each other and with the anchor demographics provided. Output valid JSON only, no explanation.
generation_prompt_template.user:
Generate a realistic Vietnamese persona.

Anchors:
- Age: {age}
- Gender: {gender}
- Province: {province} ({region})

Fill in:
{
  "job_title": "",
  "industry": "",
  "company_size": "",
  "education_level": "",
  "income_bracket": "",
  "primary_platform": "",
  "search_language": "",
  "top_3_frustrations": ["", "", ""]
}
generation_prompt_template.batch_note: Batch 5-10 personas per call for efficiency. Include region in the prompt so Qwen knows the economic context.

top_3_frustrations: Guest complaints pile up and there's no system to track them
I manually update room availability across 3 booking platforms
Staff scheduling is done on paper and always has conflicts
Shrimp prices dropped 20% but feed costs went up
Saltwater intrusion is getting worse every dry season
I can't get a loan without complicated paperwork at the bank
Our codebase has zero documentation and the senior dev just quit
I spend half my day in meetings instead of coding
The company uses 5 different tools and none of them talk to each other

report_output_examples.description: Segments in the final report are labeled with human-readable demographics. Every word is actionable.

segments.name: Hotel managers in Da Nang & Khanh Hoa (25-44, university)
segments.top_frustration: No system to track guest complaints and room availability
segments.top_query: phần mềm quản lý khách sạn

segments.name: Shrimp farmers in Mekong Delta (35-64, Zalo-primary)
segments.top_frustration: Volatile prices and no market information
segments.top_query: giá tôm hôm nay Cà Mau

segments.name: Junior devs in HCMC (22-28, English-searching)
segments.top_frustration: Poor documentation, too many disconnected tools
segments.top_query: best project management tool for startups
